about.title: Where
about.subtitle: About me
about.description: I'm Mariandrea, a frontend developer and UX/UI designer passionate about creating digital experiences that not only look amazing but work flawlessly. I combine design thinking with clean and efficient code. My focus is on understanding users, prototyping creative solutions, and building interfaces that tell stories. Every pixel has a purpose, every interaction counts.
about.subdescription: My focus is on understanding users, prototyping creative solutions, and building interfaces that tell stories. Every pixel has a purpose, every interaction counts.

scrollyCase.step1Body: Dense information and a less guided first read—everything competing for attention at once.
scrollyCase.step2Body: Typography, whitespace, and repeatable modules that match the product story.
scrollyCase.step3Body: A researcher-first narrative and trust in the data, closer to a best-in-class SaaS presence.
